message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first TUI pane-agg + timeline reads (tick 256)

Continues the TUI query sweep started in tick 255. Migrates 3 additional
ambient storage calls across 2 `ProductionQueryClient` methods in
`frankenterm-core/tui/query.rs`.

**`list_panes` pane-aggregation block (L453 area, shared `agg_cx`):**

- `storage.count_unhandled_events_by_pane()` →
  `count_unhandled_events_by_pane_with_cx(&agg_cx)`
- `storage.get_last_activity_by_pane()` →
  `get_last_activity_by_pane_with_cx(&agg_cx)`

Both reads are dispatched concurrently via `runtime_compat::join!` with
the same `agg_cx` binding — a single `Cx::current()` resolve covers both
branches of the join.

**`list_timeline` handler (L960 area):**

- `storage.get_timeline(query)` (bare `block_on`) →
  `get_timeline_with_cx(&timeline_cx, query)` (wrapped in a small async
  block inside `block_on`). Resolves `timeline_cx` at call time like
  the other TUI handlers.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 70 (187-256).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 17 (runtime.rs 7 + mcp.rs 2 + tui/query.rs 8).
main.rs cross-crate total: 127 sites (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
